properties.name: Plasma
properties.description: Plasma system — 2 robots on pedestals, ventilation booth, demo scope
properties.notes: Client wants 2 robots on pedestals, design changes in progress

CSAP scope extracted from DED: 35 JPH net/42.2 gross, 100% degrade, 15s transfer, 98.7% availability, install shutdown 07/27/2026. Robots specified by Integrator, purchased by Ford. Rockwell L8 Safety PLC, AVS/FIS integration. PROTAG process + Protag Green. Plasma bead spec: 25mm ±2mm, 90° ±5°, 10mm distance. Virtual commissioning: CAD LOD400 by MOD build+4mo, PLC programs MOD build+2mo. 3 weeks startup support proposed. Units: J-01-01 through J-01-07 covering plasma automation, EoAT, contact angle check, marking, virtual commissioning, training, conveyor.

CSAP + DTP Truck scope extracted. CSAP (Cuautitlan): 35 JPH net/42.2 gross, shutdown 07/27/2026, shutdown 07/27/2026. DTP Truck (Kentucky Truck): 65.2 JPH net/72.1 gross, P702 model, shutdown 06/29/2026, Column A8, cab+box skids. Demolition: blackout booth, 80ft P217 relocation, Indicon Color Inspection to remain (contact Chris Tawfik ctawfik@ford.com). AVS: Feng Ren fren1@ford.com, Ram Ballal rballal@ford.com. Both plants: 100% degrade, 15s transfer, 98.7% availability, Rockwell L8 Safety PLC, PROTAG+Green, plasma bead 25mm ±2mm, 90° ±5°, 10mm distance, virtual commissioning 4mo from MOD build.

CSAP + DTP Truck + FRAP scope. FRAP (Flat Rock): 40 JPH net/48.2 gross, S650 model, shutdown 07/06/2026, Column PA4-PA5. Key issue: carrier accumulation risk at PF48 — units stop 27s before release, pusher indexer causes rear trolley collision. Demolition: blackout booth near Column PA2, routing panel/junction box relocation. AVS: Ron Uptegraff ruptegra@ford.com, Nick Young nyoung51@ford.com. All plants: 100% degrade, 15s transfer, 98.7% availability, Rockwell L8 Safety PLC, PROTAG+Green, plasma bead 25mm ±2mm, 90° ±5°, 10mm distance, virtual commissioning 4mo from MOD build.

FULL SCOPE — 4 Plants:

1. CSAP (Cuautitlan): CX727, 35 JPH net/42.2 gross, shutdown 07/27/2026
2. DTP Truck (Kentucky): P702, 65.2/72.1 JPH, shutdown 06/29/2026, Column A8, cab+box skids. Demolition: blackout booth, 80ft P217 relocation, Indicon Color Inspection to remain (Chris Tawfik ctawfik@ford.com)
3. FRAP (Flat Rock): S650, 40/48.2 JPH, shutdown 07/06/2026, Column PA4-PA5. Key issue: carrier accumulation at PF48 — units stop 27s before release. Demolition: blackout booth near Column PA2
4. KC Truck (Kansas City): P702, 59.3/71.5 JPH, shutdown 06/29/2026, Column PC/PD 23-25. Base bid: upgrade CPU7 + R1/R2 to GVOSS standards (CEC original programming). Demolition: roll beds near PD23, 11ft6in overhead I-beam clearance

All plants: 100% degrade, 15s transfer, 98.7% availability, Rockwell L8 Safety PLC, PROTAG+Green, plasma bead 25mm ±2mm, 90° ±5°, 10mm distance, Enercon/Plasma Treat EoAT, virtual commissioning 4mo from MOD build, 3 weeks startup support

MBUSI Gluing Cells — 4 cells: BDH, BDV, DVD, GFD. Tuscaloosa plant, MB.EA-L A2 W138.

BDH Cell (000_B2.401_BDH_Cell_MBEAL_V01.01.pdf):
- Models: V/X/Z267, V571 SUV
- SOP: 04/2028 (V267)
- S-LOT milestones: 04/2028–12/2028
- Install milestones: 07/31/2026, 01/15/2027, 04/15/2027, 05/15/2027, 06/15/2027, 09/30/2028, 10/30/2028
- Summer shutdown 2027, winter shutdown 2027/28
- Equipment cycle time: 67 sec
- Conveyor availability: >99.5%
- 3 robots: 1x De-stacking (KUKA), 1x Gluing/Assembly (KUKA), 1x Measuring (KR210 R3100-2)
- 2x tool changers (1 with 3 grippers, 1 with 1 gripper)
- Glue system: INTEC heated double barrel pump
- Adhesive: width=9mm, height=13mm
- VMT Sense&Place measuring system
- 2D DMC coincidence check
- Virtual commissioning (VIBN) required
- Commissioning parts: 6 parts/model + 1-2 b/w per model at MBUSI

MBUSI Gluing Cells — 4 cells: BDH, BDV, DVD, GFD. Tuscaloosa, MB.EA-L A2 W138.

BDH Cell: Models V/X/Z267, V571, SOP 04/2028, cycle 67sec, >99.5% conveyor. 3 robots (De-stack KUKA, Gluing KUKA, Measuring KR210 R3100-2), 2x tool changers, INTEC pump, VMT measuring, 2D DMC coincidence check, adhesive 9mmx13mm, VIBN virtual commissioning, commissioning parts 6/model+1-2 b/w.

BDV Cell: Same specs as BDH. Options: Screwing unit (BDV_option_02), Manipulator for assembling frame (BDV_option_03). Same S-LOT milestones 07/31/2026–10/30/2028.

MBUSI Gluing Cells — 4 cells: BDH, BDV, DVD, GFD. Tuscaloosa, MB.EA-L A2 W138.

BDH Cell: Models V/X/Z267 V571, SOP 04/2028, cycle 67sec, >99.5% conveyor. 3 robots (De-stack KUKA, Gluing KUKA, Measuring KR210 R3100-2), 2x tool changers, INTEC pump, VMT measuring, 2D DMC coincidence check, adhesive 9mmx13mm, VIBN virtual commissioning, commissioning parts 6/model+1-2 b/w.

BDV Cell: Same as BDH. Options: Screwing unit (BDV_option_02), Manipulator for assembling frame (BDV_option_03).

DVD Cell: Door visor aluminum roof. Models V267 X267 Z267 V571. SOP V267 04/2028 V571 12/2028. Building A2 TechLine St. 4. Different from BDH/BDV: 1 picking robot (manual magazine load by operator), 2 gluing robots (simultaneous DVD pad application), vacuum fixation tables. Separate backup cell with manual DVD installation. VIBN virtual commissioning.

MBUSI Gluing Cells — 4 cells: BDH, BDV, DVD, GFD. Tuscaloosa AL, MB.EA-L A2 W138. SOP 04/2028–12/2028. S-LOT milestones 07/31/2026–10/30/2028.

BDH Cell: Models V/X/Z267 V571, SOP 04/2028, cycle 67sec, >99.5% conveyor. 3 robots (De-stack KUKA, Gluing KUKA, Measuring KR210 R3100-2), 2x tool changers, INTEC heated double barrel pump, VMT measuring, 2D DMC coincidence check, adhesive 9mmx13mm. VIBN virtual commissioning. Commissioning parts 6/model+1-2 b/w.

BDV Cell: Same specs as BDH. Options: Screwing unit, Manipulator for assembling frame.

DVD Cell: Door visor aluminum roof. Models V267 X267 Z267 V571. SOP V267 04/2028 V571 12/2028. Building A2 TechLine St. 4. 1 picking robot (manual magazine load by operator), 2 gluing robots (simultaneous DVD pad application), vacuum fixation tables, separate backup cell with manual DVD installation. VIBN virtual commissioning.

GFD Cell: Roof gluing with integrated backup. Models V/X/Z/C267 V571. SOP V267 04/2028 X267 06/2028 Z267 09/2028 V571 11/2028. Building A2 TechLine St. 7+8. 2 de-stacking robots on same 7th linear axis, 3 carrier bays, 2 separated cell areas (centering/gluing/measuring), 3 PLCs. Options: AGV support frames, eccentric lifters. VIBN virtual commissioning.

All cells: KUKA de-stacking/gluing, INTEC glue system, VMT measuring, virtual commissioning VIBN, commissioning parts 6/model+1-2 b/w.

FRAP Mega Cell — Flat Rock Assembly, Sealer Mega Cell Installation DED Rev. 3. Models S650 and S750. Line rate 52.4 JPH net/64.5 gross, 12s transfer. 100% degrade. Controls Rockwell L8 ControlLogix safety PLC (Mitsubishi iQ-R alternate price required). PROTAG + Protag Green. 9 Units J-01-01 through J-01-09. Underbody moved 40ft PC-P3 to PD-P3. Mega Cell relocated PO-P3 to PT-P3. Scope: Underbody Sealer Interior/Exterior 359 seam sealer LASD Overhem of Hood 360 Tailgate 270 Door 270 Skive automation Automated Inspection. Material: WSS-M4G252-E2 or WSS-M4G359-A. AVS/FIS EN2T cards not supplied by Ford. Timing sheet separate (FRAP S750 2026 Sealer Mega Cell Timing).
